# Execution Packet

<!-- READ-ONLY TEMPLATE. Do NOT edit this file during a task. -->
<!-- The planner READS this schema and EMITS a filled copy in its response. -->
<!-- The orchestrator pipes that filled copy to the executor via temp file (e.g. /tmp/execute-packet.md) — never written back here. -->
<!-- The executor returns the filled `Handoff` section in its own output, not by editing this file. -->
<!-- If a step is ambiguous OR the executor cannot proceed (missing context, blocked environment, decision needed), do NOT guess and do NOT ask the user — the executor runs non-interactively. Instead, emit the Escalation output format defined in `.ai/workflow/dispatch.md` as your final output and exit non-zero. -->

Task ID: <!-- must match the planning packet -->
Objective: <!-- one sentence -->
Size: <!-- trivial | small | medium | large -->

## Steps
<!-- Ordered. Each step = one atomic change. Max 7 steps per packet. -->
<!-- If >7, the planner should have decomposed into multiple packets. -->
<!-- Format: -->
<!-- 1. [verb] [target file] — [what to change and why] -->

## File Context
<!-- Planner pastes the minimum code snippets the executor needs. -->
<!-- This avoids the executor re-reading entire files to find context. -->
<!-- Format: file:line — snippet -->

## Boundaries
Allowed files: <!-- only these files may be modified -->
Do-not-touch files/dirs: <!-- these must not be changed under any circumstance -->

## Tests
To add: <!-- MUST be byte-identical to the planning packet's `Tests to add:`. If during planning you realise this field needs to change, go back and amend the plan packet too — never let plan and execute disagree. Format: `- <test name or path::case> — verifies <acceptance criterion>`. May be `none` only when the planning packet justified it (verbatim same reason). -->

## Validation
Commands: <!-- exact commands to run after implementation. Must include the test runner command if `Tests.To add` is non-empty. -->
Expected result: <!-- what success looks like -->

## Handoff
<!-- Executor fills this section AFTER completing the work. -->
<!-- This becomes the input for the review packet. -->
Files changed:
Tests added:
<!-- Mirror Tests.To add. For each planned test, state: -->
<!--   - <test name or path::case> — added | skipped (<reason>) -->
<!-- A test may be skipped only with a concrete reason (e.g. "framework not present, manual smoke documented in Validation evidence"). Vague reasons → reviewer rejects. -->
<!-- If Tests.To add was `none`, write `none` here. -->
Validation evidence:
<!-- For EACH command in `Validation.Commands`, paste a block: -->
<!--   $ <command> -->
<!--   exit: <code> -->
<!--   tail: <last 10 lines of output, or full output if shorter> -->
<!-- If a command could not be run, state why explicitly. -->
<!-- Empty, missing, or non-zero exits → reviewer must return `request-changes`. -->
Deviations from plan: <!-- none, or list each deviation with reason -->
New risks discovered: <!-- none, or list each -->
Memory updates: <!-- operational facts learned, to append to .ai/memory.md. Use format `- YYYY-MM-DD [topic] fact`. One per line. -->
Pending deletions: <!-- files/dirs that MUST be deleted but were NOT executed — orchestrator runs these after review -->
